title: Trial-Landscape Record Schema v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Schema And Tooling Phase Inventory v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Schema validation does not make a trial-landscape record medical advice.

The schema does not accept eligibility guidance, enrollment advice, availability claims for any person, sponsor access instructions, treatment recommendations, expanded-access guidance, trial matching, option rankings, or real case data.
The schema does not prove trial availability, safety, efficacy, appropriateness, enrollment status, sponsor access, eligibility, or patient fit.
The template is public placeholder data only.
